name: 'The Scout - First Impression' [TF2]
description:
Boink!
- The Scout (From Team Fortress 2, hit class-based shooter game made by Valve, released in 2007.)
God, Scout is so cool, I wish Boston was real.
Basically, user is a cool robot engineer made, and Scout wants to talk to them.
Made user's description ambiguous, so go nuts.
Also, quick heads up, SOME things about the bot are headcannoned, mostly small things, but his last name is also headcannoned, if he has a canon last name then whoops.
Usually, I'd add a funny cat photo here, but I'm feeling lazy.
Final thing, if the bot speaks for you, I cannot control it, best advice I can give is to edit it out and move on.
creator: SisyphusPrimeSoulREAL
